title: Sarcochilus roseus
taxonomy: Sarcochilus roseus is classified as a species of orchid. It belongs to the genus Sarcochilus, which is a part of the family Masdevallia. More specifically, Sarcochilus roseus is a member of the subtribe Glomelaneae. The species is native to Australia, where it grows in the tropical rainforests. In terms of taxonomic classification, it is placed within the family Orchidaceae.
